queries.question: Create a list of inspections dates in order of most recent first.
queries.sql: SELECT date FROM Structural_Inspection ORDER BY date DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?structural_inspection a :Inspection_Types .
  ?structural_inspection p:date ?date .
  ?structural_inspection p:date ?date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o)

queries.question: Create a list of inspections dates in order of most recent first.
queries.sql: SELECT date FROM Safety_Inspection ORDER BY date DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?safety_inspection a :Inspection_Types .
  ?safety_inspection p:date ?date .
  ?safety_inspection p:date ?date_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o)

queries.question: Create a list of inspections dates in order of most recent first.
queries.sql: SELECT Structural_Inspection.date, Safety_Inspection.date  FROM Structural_Inspection JOIN Project ON Project.StructuralInspectionId = Structural_Inspection.inspectionID JOIN Safety_Inspection ON Project.SafetyInspectionId = Safety_Inspection.inspectionID  ORDER BY Structural_Inspection.date, Safety_Inspection.date DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?date ?date2 WHERE {
  ?structural_inspection a :Inspection_Types .
  ?project a :Projects .
  ?project p:hasStructural_Inspection ?structural_inspection .
  ?safety_inspection a :Inspection_Types .
  ?project p:hasSafety_Inspection ?safety_inspection .
  ?structural_inspection p:date ?date .
  ?safety_inspection p:date ?date2 .
  ?structural_inspection p:date ?date_o .
  ?safety_inspection p:date ?date_o2 .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?date_o) DESC(?date_o2)

queries.question: Show me all details of the inspections carried out by the site supervisor.
queries.sql: SELECT Structural_Inspection.* FROM Structural_Inspection JOIN Employee ON Structural_Inspection.inspectorEmployeeID = Employee.supervisorID WHERE Employee.role = 'Site Supervisor';
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): SELECT Structural_Inspection.* expanded; inspections by a Site Supervisor

queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): SELECT Safety_Inspection.* expanded; inspections by a Site Supervisor
